package.name: bam_transform_math
package.description:
Minimal, dependency-light C++ library for rigid-body (SE3) transform math used by the Baseball Avoidance Multirotor (BAM) ML relative pose estimation pipeline. Implements homogeneous transforms, quaternion/rotation-matrix conversion, transform composition and inversion, and WP2 pixel-ray stubs. Conventions follow /docs/data_contract.md exactly (scalar-first [w,x,y,z], NED world frame, q_i2b direction).
Epic: CM-44
